entry.title: Bill 128 (Hawaiʻi County): — → Passed Second Reading
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 19, ARTICLE 6, SECTION 19-46.1, AND ARTICLE 11, SECTION 19-90, OF THE HAWAIʻI COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO REAL PROPERTY TAXES

Adds a new “Residential Tier Three” real property tax classification for certain properties with a net taxable real property value of more than $4,000,000.

Status: — → Passed Second Reading

Latest action: Council: Bill 128 passes second & final reading - 03/04/26

View on the council site

entry.title: New: Bill 128 (Hawaiʻi County) — On agenda 2026-03-04
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 19, ARTICLE 6, SECTION 19-46.1, AND ARTICLE 11, SECTION 19-90, OF THE HAWAIʻI COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO REAL PROPERTY TAXES

Adds a new “Residential Tier Three” real property tax classification for certain properties with a net taxable real property value of more than $4,000,000.

Latest action: On agenda 2026-03-04
